description:
Join us on Wednesday, May 13, from 4 - 7 PM at Whispering Vine - South Creek for a tasting featuring Rombauer.

Tasting Fee: $45 per person (Buy a tasting bottle and your fee is refunded.)

Featured Wines:

  • Rombauer Cabernet Sauvignon 2022 – $59.99, Winery $65 – Red raspberry, currant and herbs lead into cassis, baking spice and bright acidity.
  • Rombauer California Zinfandel 2023 – $36.99 – Cherry jam, blackberry and nutmeg with soft tannins and a lingering finish.
  • Rombauer Chardonnay 2024 – $37.99, Winery $42 – Yellow peach, melon and citrus with creamy vanilla, buttery nuance and bright acidity.
  • Rombauer Sauvignon Blanc 2023 – $25.99 – Passion fruit, green melon and lime with grapefruit lift and mouthwatering acidity.

Come explore Rombauer and find your favorite bottle. Buy a bottle from the tasting and your fee is refunded.
title: Rombauer Tasting
